mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.room_id, r.seat_id, r.reservation_number, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.status, r.payment_status, r.payment_time, r.amount, r.trade_no, r.refund_amount, r.refund_time, r.refund_status, r.refund_reason, r.create_time, r.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE DATE(r.start_time) = #{date} OR DATE(r.end_time) = #{date} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId} AND r.status IN (1, 2) AND ( (r.start_time <= #{startTime} AND r.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (r.start_time < #{endTime} AND r.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (r.start_time >= #{startTime} AND r.end_time <= #{endTime}) )
SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} AND r.status IN (1, 2) AND r.end_time > NOW()
SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId} AND r.status IN (1, 2) AND r.end_time > NOW()
SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.status IN (1, 2) AND r.end_time <= NOW()

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.status IN (1, 2) AND r.payment_status = 1 AND r.end_time > NOW() AND r.end_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MINUTE)
SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.status = 0 AND r.payment_status = 0 AND r.create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)
SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId} AND r.status = 0 AND r.payment_status = 0

SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId} AND r.status IN (1, 2) AND ( (r.start_time <= #{startTime} AND r.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (r.start_time < #{endTime} AND r.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (r.start_time >= #{startTime} AND r.end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.seat_id = #{seatId} AND r.status = 0 AND r.payment_status = 0 AND ( (r.start_time <= #{startTime} AND r.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (r.start_time < #{endTime} AND r.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (r.start_time >= #{startTime} AND r.end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.payment_status = 1 AND r.status != 4 AND ( (DATE(r.start_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.start_time) <= #{endDate}) OR (DATE(r.end_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.end_time) <= #{endDate}) OR (DATE(r.start_time) <= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.end_time) >= #{endDate}) ) ORDER BY r.start_time ASC

SELECT FROM reservation r WHERE r.payment_status = 1 AND r.status != 4 AND ( (DATE(r.start_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.start_time) <= #{endDate}) OR (DATE(r.end_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.end_time) <= #{endDate}) OR (DATE(r.start_time) <= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.end_time) >= #{endDate}) ) ORDER BY r.start_time ASC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.payment_status = 1 AND r.status != 4 AND r.status != 3 AND ( (NOW() >= r.start_time AND NOW() <= r.end_time) OR (NOW() >= DATE_SUB(r.start_time, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AND NOW() < r.start_time) ) ORDER BY r.start_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON r.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.payment_status = 1 AND r.status IN (1, 2) AND r.status != 4 AND ( (r.start_time <= #{startTime} AND r.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (r.start_time < #{endTime} AND r.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (r.start_time >= #{startTime} AND r.end_time <= #{endTime}) ) ORDER BY r.start_time ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, room_id, seat_id, reservation_number, start_time, end_time, status, payment_status, amount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roomId}, #{seatId}, #{reservationNumber}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{paymentStatus}, #{amount})
